publishedAbstract: * It's sometimes required to run standard networking commands (nestat, qperf) to inspect the health of the Ceph cluster inside OCS. This is particularly useful to troubleshoot slow requests. * Unfortunately, the osd / mon pods don't come with these tools available. * How to run then these commands in OCS pods?
publishedTitle: How to run network troubleshooting commands in OCS 4.x?
